LoginPage.title: Login
LoginPage.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
LoginPage.passwordTooShort: The password is too simple. Use more characters
LoginPage.passwordTooLong: The password is too long. Use fewer characters
LoginPage.badCredentials: Wrong email or password, please try again later.
LoginPage.internalError: Internal server error, please try again later.

RegisterPage.title: Register
RegisterPage.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
RegisterPage.passwordTooShort: The password is too simple. Use more characters
RegisterPage.passwordTooLong: The password is too long. Use fewer characters
RegisterPage.alreadyExistError: The user with this email already exists. Log in with a password or restore it.
RegisterPage.internalError: Internal server error, please try again later.

ConfirmEmailPage.title: Email Confirmation
ConfirmEmailPage.description: To fully use your account, please confirm the email address you provided during registration
ConfirmEmailPage.codeInputHelperText: Check your inbox and enter the code you received in the email
ConfirmEmailPage.loadingError: Something went wrong. Please try again later
ConfirmEmailPage.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ConfirmEmailPage.alreadySent: A code has already been sent. Enter the code from the email, or resend it in 10 minutes
ConfirmEmailPage.internalError: Internal server error, please try again later.
ConfirmEmailPage.attemptsLimit: Too many attempts to enter the confirmation code
ConfirmEmailPage.alreadyExistError: The user with this email already exists.

ServerListPage.title: List of worlds
ServerListPage.notAuthorized: You are not authorized. To start playing,
ServerListPage.genericError: Something went wrong. Unable to enter the game, please try again later
ServerListPage.emailNotConfirmed: Email is not confirmed. Confirm it to get full access to the site’s functionality.
ServerListPage.failedToFetch: Failed to fetch world list. Please try again later
ServerListPage.accessDenied: Access denied. Unable to enter the world
ServerListPage.onlinePlayers: The number of active characters in the world

NotFoundPage.title: Page Not Found
NotFoundPage.description: Looks like this page doesn’t exist

ResetPasswordPage.title: Password Recovery
ResetPasswordPage.alreadySent: A code has already been sent. Please enter the code from the email, or request a new one in 10 minutes
ResetPasswordPage.codeExpired: The code has expired. Please request a new one
ResetPasswordPage.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ResetPasswordPage.passwordTooShort: The password is too simple. Use more characters
ResetPasswordPage.passwordTooLong: The password is too long. Use fewer characters
ResetPasswordPage.stepEmailText: Enter the email of your account. We’ll send a verification code to it, and once you enter it, you’ll be able to set a new password
ResetPasswordPage.stepCodeText: Check your inbox at {email} and enter the code you received in the email
ResetPasswordPage.stepPasswordText: Create and enter a new password
ResetPasswordPage.internalError: Internal server error, please try again later.
ResetPasswordPage.attemptsLimit: Too many attempts to enter the confirmation code
ResetPasswordPage.notFoundCode: The confirmation code has not been sent, please try again.

PromoPage.title: CW Game
PromoPage.description: CW Game is an online browser game where you can immerse yourself in the world of cats. Create your own unique character and team up with others to form a tribe. Develop it, capture territories and compete with others — loyal friends and worthy opponents are waiting for you!

Footer.footerText: CW Game. A labour of love by the CW Game team and all who care.
